articles.title: The Day After 29.0: Have the Oilers put their early season woes behind them?
articles.description: Have the Edmonton Oilers found their mojo? Is the early-season slump over? Have they, like in the last two years, finally started to find their game two months into the season? The latest stretch of games, punctuated by a 6-2 walloping of the Winnipeg Jets, shows that might be the case. It still might be…
articles.author: Zach Laing

articles.title: Another offensive explosion sees Oilers down Jets 6-2: Recap, Highlights, and Reaction
articles.description: That’s two in a row. On Saturday evening, the Edmonton Oilers played their third game on the five-game homestand, defeating the Winnipeg Jets 6-2. This came just two days after they smashed the Seattle Kraken 9-4. Safe to say they are officially back, so let’s take a look at what happened in this one! The…
articles.author: Ryley Delaney

articles.title: GDB 29.0: Oilers eye winning streak against the struggling Jets (8PM MT, HNIC)
articles.description: After putting together their best offensive night on Thursday in a 9-4 win over the Kraken, the Oilers look to keep the momentum going in the third game of this five-game homestand against the Winnipeg Jets. At 12-11-5, the boys are still trying to find traction in a season that has offered almost none, but…
articles.author: baggedmilk

articles.title: Scenes From Morning Skate: Knoblauch sticks with four-goal second line
articles.description: Kris Knoblauch didn’t exactly plan for Vasily Podkolzin, Leon Draisaitl, and Matt Savoie to become his second line against the Seattle Kraken, and now the Winnipeg Jets. But when you’ve already cycled through 28 different forward combinations in your first 13 games, you’re not so much making calculated decisions as you are reacting to whatever…
articles.author: Caprice St. Pierre

articles.title: Oilers Rumours: No deal for goaltender in place despite ‘some wild speculation’
articles.description: The noise around the Edmonton Oilers’ goaltending has quieted down in the last week, as since the team’s 8-3 blowout loss to the Dallas Stars, things have improved. It’s just a three-game stretch, mind you, but the Oilers have gone 2-1 with a pair of wins over the Kraken, in which Edmonton outscored them 13-4,…
articles.author: Zach Laing

articles.title: Pre-Scout: Jets bounce back but have quick turnaround to face Oilers
articles.description: November was not so kind to the Winnipeg Jets.  The Jets were 31st in points percentage in November at .385 per cent a far cry from being 6th in that same category in October.  That’s the type of run that gets you in the basement of the league and a lottery pick.  However, seeing the…
articles.author: Michael Menzies

articles.title: Five Oilers who are elevating their play in recent games
articles.description: After suffering a 9-1 loss earlier this season, the Edmonton Oilers finally got to enjoy the other side of a 9-something beatdown, defeating the Seattle Kraken 9-4 in their most recent outing. They battled their way through a tough start to the season with lengthy road trips, and now, with some time to settle in…
articles.author: Sean Panganiban

articles.title: McDavid's hat trick ties Messier; Oilers rout Kraken
articles.description: Connor McDavid had his 13th career hat trick to tie Mark Messier for fourth in Oilers history in Edmonton's 9-4 romp over the Seattle Kraken on Thursday night.

articles.title: Projecting Canada's 2026 Olympic hockey roster: Connor Bedard playing his way onto loaded team
articles.description: Bedard has earned his spot on the roster next to stars like Connor McDavid and Nathan MacKinnon
articles.author: Austin Nivison

articles.title: Lightning’s Hedman returns to lineup; Kucherov, Vasilevskiy day-to-day
articles.description: Hedman missed the last 12 games with an undisclosed injury.
